hero.title: A New Accommodation Standard for Large Families in Uzbekistan
hero.subtitle: A unique service built with national characteristics in mind. Spacious apartments and houses adapted for tourist groups and families of 6–12 people.

problem.title: What challenges do large families face?
problem.subtitle: Large families and groups of 6+ people are forced to overpay or split into separate rooms due to the lack of suitable infrastructure.

items.title: Shortage of Suitable Housing
items.desc: Finding a single house or spacious apartment for 6–12 people at once is an extremely difficult task in the Uzbekistan market.

items.title: High Cost of Hotels
items.desc: Traditional hotels charge per room (1-2 people), which heavily impacts the budget of large families.

items.title: Limited Comfort
items.desc: Lack of full kitchens and large common living areas designed for the whole family to spend time together.

items.title: No Dedicated Services
items.desc: Existing rental services are aimed at couples or solo travelers, not at large groups.

solution.title: Heaven Feel: Designed for Groups
solution.subtitle: The first startup in Uzbekistan specializing exclusively in accommodating families and tourist groups of 6 or more.

items.title: Focus on Large Families
items.desc: Spaces explicitly zoned for the comfortable, safe, and joint accommodation of large groups.

items.title: True Home Atmosphere
items.desc: You rent a full house, not just a bed: featuring a spacious living room and a safe yard for children.

items.title: Save up to 40% of the Budget
items.desc: Renting one of our villas is significantly cheaper than booking 4-5 separate rooms in a standard hotel.

items.title: Easy Booking
items.desc: Flexible online booking capabilities for both short-term and long-term rentals.

items.title: Absolute Safety
items.desc: Contract-based operation. Guest registration logs and strict control over cleanliness and transaction security.

compare.title: Why Heaven Feel Beats the Competition?
compare.subtitle: Comparative analysis of offers for a family of 8. Heaven Feel offers the best ratio of price, comfort, and domestic coziness.

mvp.title: Innovative Booking App
mvp.subtitle: We are developing our proprietary mobile MVP for convenient search and secure online booking of family properties.

features.title: Instant Search
features.desc: An intelligent filter strictly selects housing based on the number of family members.

features.title: Availability Check
features.desc: Integrated calendar displaying available dates in real-time.

features.title: Online Contract
features.desc: Electronic signing of short-term lease agreements directly within the app.

resources.title: Current Property Portfolio
resources.subtitle: At the launch stage, we have 3 fully equipped properties ready to host guests.

items.name: Family Apartment
items.desc: A spacious 4-room urban apartment. Features a huge living room, perfect cleanliness, and a full set of household appliances.

items.name: Family Villa №1
items.desc: A house with a closed inner courtyard, creating the atmosphere of true Uzbek hospitality ('hovli').

items.name: Family Villa №2
items.desc: A two-story cottage. Perfect for multi-generational recreation. Safe play area for children.

roadmap.title: Startup Implementation Strategy
roadmap.subtitle: A clear, step-by-step plan from ideation to B2B partnership scaling.

phases.title: Preparation (M 1-2)
phases.desc: Preparing 1 apartment and 2 houses, renovation, purchasing furniture/appliances, official registration.

phases.title: Project Launch (M 3)
phases.desc: Photography, placing listings, creating Instagram & Telegram pages, starting to accept bookings.

phases.title: Promotion (M 4-6)
phases.desc: Social media advertising, discounts for large families. Working with reviews and recommendations.

phases.title: Service Development (M 6-12)
phases.desc: Introducing additional services: cleaning, on-demand transfers (minibusses).

phases.title: Scaling (M 12+)
phases.desc: Cooperation with travel agencies, expanding the real estate property base.

impact.title: Transparency and Benefit to Society
impact.subtitle: The 'Heaven Feel' project has a pronounced social orientation and absolute legal purity.

items.title: Supporting Large Families
items.desc: Providing affordable, home-like housing for families with three or more children.

items.title: Job Creation
items.desc: Forming vacancies in the service, cleaning, and administration sectors.

impact.regDesc: The startup is fully prepared for official and transparent work. All necessary legal and organizational procedures have been implemented.

team.title: The Heaven Feel Team
team.subtitle: An ambitious team of specialists driving the project forward.

footer.competitionSub: Created specifically for the Republican Competition
footer.copyright: © 2026 Heaven Feel - Family Stay. Developed by Tuychiyeva Sh.

reviews.title: What Our Guests Say
reviews.desc: Real stories from families and tourist groups who chose the comfort of Heaven Feel.

items.name: The Smiths (7 people)
items.text: «Perfect place for our huge family. Much more convenient and cheaper than booking 3 different hotel rooms!»

items.name: Tourist Group from Germany
items.text: «Beautiful kitchen and a highly spacious hall where we could all gather in the evening. True hospitality.»

items.name: The Johnsons (5 people)
items.text: «The kids loved the space. Very clean, safe, and cozy. Felt just like home.»
